name: Fridge Drink Pusher and Organizer - Brightroom™
description:
Make your drinks easily accessible with the help of this Fridge Drink Pusher and Organizer from Brightroom™. Made of BPA-free material, this organizer features a smooth glider that helps organize the drinks and keep them at the front. It has three rows, perfectly sized to fit 15 standard 16.9 fluid ounce bottles or 15 standard 12 fluid ounce cans.

Brightroom™: See your space in a new light.
